productDisplayName: Nike Men AS Thermal Grey Track Pants
description: CompositionGrey trackpants made of 100% polyester, is engineered with Therma Fit technology, has an elasticated waist with drawcords, zippered pockets on the sides and on the right back, zippered hems on the bottom leg and embroidered nike swoosh logo on the left thighFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach or lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowDo not ironDesigned for the man who never compromises on comfort and style, this trackpant from nike is crafted from polyester fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit. The Therma Fit technology ensures you enjoy your tennis matches and casual outings in warm comfort this winter. Add on sporty t-shirts and sneakers.
